summary: Verified new 'Retained clients' feature + 'All time' date-range preset on the Lemon Pros admin. Backend pytest (10/10 passing) covers POST /api/admin/leads/{id}/retained toggle (sets retained_at when true, clears when false), POST /api/admin/calls/{id}/retained (same), auth requirement, missing-id 404s, and GET /api/admin/retained aggregation (items/total/lead_count/call_count with all-time range). Frontend Playwright verified: new admin-tab-retained sits between Leads and Settings, retained-stat-total/leads/calls cards + retained-table render, default range is 'All time', lead/call retained toggles switch label to 'Retained client ✓ (click to remove)' and add lead-/call-retained-badge-<id> on the row, and date-preset-all is present and functional in Funnel, Analytics, Calls, Leads, and Retained date filters. After marking one lead + one call retained the Retained tab correctly showed total=2, lead_count=1, call_count=1.

issues: Radix Dialog console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' (minor a11y warning, not blocking).

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to the lead & call detail dialogs to silence the Radix a11y warning.
(Optional) Clean up leftover retained test-lead 'TEST Iter20DG' remaining in DB from a previous iteration (visible in Retained tab).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py mark_lead_retained/mark_call_retained update the record but do not call _record_activity, so 'Marked as retained' / 'Unmarked' actions are NOT recorded in the admin change history (all other similar admin write endpoints log activity via the middleware/_CHANGE_RULES). Consider adding entries to _CHANGE_RULES for /admin/leads/{id}/retained and /admin/calls/{id}/retained.

GET /admin/retained defaults start/end to today via _date_range() when either param is empty. Frontend always sends the ALL_TIME_START (2000-01-01) so it works, but if a caller omits start the endpoint silently returns only today’s retained items — consider defaulting start to ALL_TIME_START server-side to make the API safer.
server.py is 3.3k+ lines. Recommend splitting into modules (admin, tracking, verification, etc.) per code-review guideline (>700 lines).
seed_data_creation: Created one lead via public /api/leads and one call via POST /api/admin/calls/test during pytest; both cleaned up (unmarked + deleted) in teardown. Frontend test also created a test call and deleted it after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retained feature end-to-end confirmed working. Backend suite: /app/backend/tests/test_retained_features.py. Note there is at least one pre-existing retained lead ('TEST Iter20DG') left over from an earlier iteration — harmless but visible in the Retained tab. If retesting, use the seed_lead/seed_call fixtures pattern already in the pytest file to avoid polluting UI.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found for the reviewed feature set.
